name: RPlog_Temple_Spirits
title: Pirates Ask After a Sith
summary: In the hangar of the Jedi Temple, the loud, swaggering quarren pirate Salty Jack and his superstitious Mon Calamari first mate Bill blunder in seeking information, interrupting a conversation between the Sullustan Jedi Enb'Zik and the freed Twi'lek slave Azya. Jack explains they are trying to identify a strange, black-cloaked figure they encountered outside a cantina on Tatooine, a man who called himself a Sith and wielded a lightsaber while Bill frets about angry temple spirits. Enb'Zik draws out further details with reserved interest, learning the Sith looked old, with black hair streaked white, and carried a large sword on his back in addition to his lightsaber, information he suspects Luke will recognize. The rest of Jack's crew, the brash Sally and the gruff Grizz, arrive to join them. Unable to name the figure himself but confident others can, Enb'Zik politely thanks the pirates and, as they depart, offers to escort the visitors back to the lobby, a courtesy that doubles as a gentle warning not to wander the temple's upper levels unescorted.
